column9:
["Thank you for letting us know about your lost baggage. We have found your flight details and your report has been forwarded to our baggage team for follow-up. 
 
To help us locate your baggage as quickly as possible, could you please describe it? Please include: 
- The color 
- The size (small/medium/large) 
- Any special features or tags 
 
If you have a picture of your baggage, sharing it can help speed up the process. 
 
Rest assured, we are here to support you and will keep you updated as soon as we have news."]
